method: DAR = fraction of top-20 differential deps with pLI > 0.5
scientific_principle: Dependency Architecture Principle (Finding_07, v2): NV-Score predicts favorable survival (HR<1) in cancer types whose cancer-SPECIFIC dependencies are dominated by high-pLI (constrained) genes. In cancers where specific dependencies are low-pLI (housekeeping/bypassable), NV-Score reflects proliferation and predicts worse survival (HR>1).
